title: atalantia angulata
intro: Atalantia angulata, also known as the "Tiger's Eye" or "Tropical Atalantia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the leaves and fruits of Atalantia angulata are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's extracts have been used to prepare capsules, tablets, and other pharmaceutical products, making it a valuable resource in the field of natural medicine.
